g.text: The cut is across the visit order, not the tree levels.
, including the primary. Visits 1 to 3 take the
three slots, so visits 4 and 5 are never reached, even though anthropic-overflow sits one
level below the primary and anthropic-eu sits two.
Every attempt failed at the connect layer: 503
provider_unavailable. Every attempt timed out pre-stream: 504 provider_timeout. Anything
else, including a walk exhausted purely by budget-blocked candidates: 502 provider_error.
: the tree must not be circular.
: every provider in it carries the
primary's spec.type. The traversal algorithm itself lives in Fallback Logic.
